title: FM Synth
description: Rhodes-style electric piano via two-operator FM synthesis with chord progression.

title: Wavetable
description: Smooch wavetable oscillator scanning through a bank of harmonic frames.

title: Microtonal
description: A meditative line in 31-EDO tuning, using micro-step operators to find intervals between the semitones.

title: Polyphony
description: Jazz progression with rich voicings allocated through poly() with a detuned saw pad.

title: Drums
description: Layered drum kit with nested mini-notation, plus a Euclidean sub-bass tresillo.

title: Effects
description: A pluck running through saturation, lowpass, delay, chorus, reverb, and compressor.

title: Interactive
description: Live UI sliders via param() driving a Moog-filtered saw stack — drag the knobs while it plays.

title: Visualizations
description: Inline oscilloscope, spectrum, and pianoroll views on a single arpeggio.

title: SoundFont
description: Melody played through the built-in General MIDI SoundFont (acoustic grand piano).

title: Oscillators
description: The smallest Akkado patch — a sine wave with vibrato. Swap the waveform name to hear saw, tri, square, or noise.

title: Kick Pattern
description: Four-on-the-floor kick driven by a mini-notation pattern.

title: Chord Stab
description: Strudel-style chord expansion with a filter and envelope.

title: Stepper Demo
description: Userspace `step` and `step_dir` operators built from `state`, `counter`, and method-call syntax — no C++ changes.
